capabilities.name: Proration on mid-cycle change
capabilities.verify: change_subscription RPC/skill — prorates by remaining days; upgrade→draft adjustment invoice, downgrade→credit on metadata (migration 20260612140000)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-12: smoke 7/7 (prorated=10000 at 50%, invoice matches, credit w/o negative invoice, non-manual rejected) + runtime via agent-execute. Qty/price-change UI. UI shipped 2026-06-12 (ChangePlanDialog: live preview delta×fraction, manual-only, invoice/credit toast). Dual-surface complete.

capabilities.name: Plan/package templates
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Table subscription_plans (name, product_name, unit_amount_cents, currency, billing_interval, trial_days, commitment_months, features, is_active). Plan templates tab in /admin/subscriptions with CRUD; New manual subscription dialog offers Start-from-plan-template selector that fills all fields. create_manual_subscription RPC extended with _plan_id.

capabilities.name: Automated dunning retry
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Automation: pg_cron dunning-processor-every-30min active; POST /functions/v1/dunning-processor → HTTP 200 {processed,recovered,cancelled,emailsSent}. Skills: list_dunning_sequences verified live via MCP gateway (pause_dunning/escalate_dunning seeded, same edge handler). UI: /admin/subscriptions/dunning DunningPage + dunning.enabled feature flag.
capabilities.notes: dunning_sequences/dunning_actions tables + processor + UI existed; the 3 agent skills were the missing surface — seeded 2026-07-07 (subscriptions-module.ts + dev agent_skills).

capabilities.name: Trial→paid funnel
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. trial_start/trial_end already exist; create_manual_subscription now accepts _trial_days (starts as trialing, first_invoice pushed to trial end). convert_trial_to_active RPC (SECURITY DEFINER + service_role escape) flips trialing→active. run_trial_conversions() sweep wired into subscription-billing-cron. UI: trial-days-left badge in the list + Convert trial → active dropdown item.

capabilities.name: Commitment/lock-in periods
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. subscriptions.commitment_start/months/end columns; create_manual_subscription accepts _commitment_months; cancel_manual_subscription now stamps early_termination + months_remaining_at_cancel in metadata and returns them. UI: Committed·Nmo badge in list; cancel confirm dialog warns about remaining commitment.
